summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 job candidates. No shared canonical was selected; closed candidates stay closed, security-sensitive candidates are routed to central security handling, and ordinary open PRs are kept for maintainer review or related issue tracking without mutation.

actions.reason: Open focused test-only maintainer PR; no duplicate/superseded closeout is supported in this inventory shard.
Related to the session-reset family, but not safely closable or mergeable in this plan-only job because it remains open with distinct claimed scope and failing historical check evidence.
Already closed; closure actions are invalid for closed refs.
Security-sensitive boundary-adjacent PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Session restore feature touches a security-boundary-labeled area and is explicitly security-routed by hydrated preflight.
Independent maintainer docs PR; keep for normal maintainer review rather than dedupe closeout.
Useful related fix candidate for #86034, but merge/fix actions are blocked in this plan job and issue closeout is not supported because the linked issue still has remaining scope.
Feed installation and approval metadata PR is explicitly security-routed by hydrated preflight and must be handled outside Clownfish cleanup.
Already closed by maintainer rationale; no close action is valid.
Related implementation candidate for the open #50093 WhatsApp backfill tracker, but failing checks and active contributor-credit context block closure or merge recommendations.
